programme.title: E288 - Dopey Dick / Plankton and the Beanstalk
programme.desc: Squidward joins a crew of sailors hunting down the great white jellyfish. // Plankton finds a magic bean that takes him to a land of giants (well, more giant than usual).

programme.title: E708 - Road Trip: Hide and Sneak
programme.desc: To help Mom make the deadline for her column, the Louds have to avoid the Casagrandes when they visit Great Lakes City.

programme.title: E243 - The Nitwitting / The Ballad of Filthy Muck
programme.desc: Patrick inducts SpongeBob into his prestigious society of dullards and doofuses. // Patrick takes his grime to a new extreme, playing around in so much trash that he becomes unrecognizable.

programme.title: E612 - Time Trap!
programme.desc: When the kids break Mom and Dad's priceless vase, they decide the only thing to do is go back in time to their wedding day, and prevent them from ever receiving it.

programme.title: E212 - Attack of The Clones
programme.desc: When Danger Force leaves for an out-of-town mission, Ray calls on the Danger Force Clones for help. He quickly realizes that even though the clones look just like their superhero counterparts, they are very, very different.

programme.title: E101 - Jade the Juggler
programme.desc: Jade tries to help too many people and ends up causing chaos in the process!

programme.title: E250 - Karen's Baby
programme.desc: Karen quickly learns that kids grow up too fast after her new child arrives in the mail.

programme.title: E245 - Gary's Got Legs / King Plankton
programme.desc: Gary is given a set of limbs to keep up with SpongeBob, but soon makes his owner look sluggish by comparison. // Plankton practices ruling the world by shrinking himself down and declaring himself king of SpongeBob's aquarium.

programme.title: E274 - Sea-Man Sponge Haters Club
programme.desc: Squidward hosts a secret 'We Hate SpongeBob Club' at his house.

programme.title: E110 - The Meatball of Canyon Valley / Sticky Fingers
programme.desc: When Halmoni chooses Jack over Lil to be her Trot dance competition partner, jealous Lil seeks revenge. / Min asks Jack to run a simple errand, but Charlie the gibbon intervenes, sending Jack and Lil chasing after him into the town's abandoned mines.

programme.title: E243 - The Nitwitting / The Ballad of Filthy Muck
programme.desc: Patrick inducts SpongeBob into his prestigious society of dullards and doofuses. // Patrick takes his grime to a new extreme, playing around in so much trash that he becomes unrecognizable.

programme.title: E109 - Party Party / Mica's Robot
programme.desc: Thinking she hasn't been invited to Bibi's party Jade sneaks in. // Mica doesn't finish his robot in time for the school science fair, so the Marsupilamis squeeze inside and operate it.

programme.title: E704 - Bye, Bye, Birthday / Tough Guise
programme.desc: Tired of the yearly cheer surrounding her birthday, Lucy casts a spell so her family will forget what day it is. // When Zach is given detention, Rusty and the rest of their friends try to toughen up him up so he'll fit in.

programme.title: E209 - Summer Chuseok / Putting Up with the Plovers
programme.desc: In an attempt to get out of the dentist, Lily insists on a summer celebration of the fall holiday Chuseok. // When Will accidentally befriends an annoying man, his sorry attempts at a break-up make things painfully awkward for the whole family.

programme.title: E210 - The Real Woori World / The Collector
programme.desc: Min tries to avoid the usual Woori World chaos, but when the family splits up they all get lost in their own fiascos. // Jack's mission to find the rare DVD sequel of his favorite movie leads him to the mysterious Collector.

programme.title: E39 - Spoon
programme.desc: What would life be like without our most everyday objects? Each episode puts a different one in the spotlight. Whether a tap, an umbrella or a toothbrush, they all have a story to tell about their invention and subsequent evolution.

programme.title: E1 - The Ice Marmot
programme.desc: Belfort, the king's dog, and Lupin, the wolf of the gardens, live in the Palace of Versailles. As inseparable as they are unlikely, they come to the rescue of all their furry and feathered friends, from the royal menagerie to the local wildlife.

programme.title: E10 - The Very Best In Design
programme.desc: In Boulogne-Billancourt, visit the Musee des Annees 30. Stefania Di Petrillo explores the emotional dimensions of design. Artistic director Pieter Mulier is following in the footsteps of the founder of the Alaia fashion house: sophistication at its best. The organic forms of an omnipresent nature are embodied in the creations of cabinetmaker Maxime Goleo.

programme.title: E2 - So Many Fun Questions to Ask!
programme.desc: Baby John has so many fun questions to ask! While playing in the garden, he asks his parents why some things are the way they are, like why his feet stink & why bubbles pop! Then, when Mom mistakenly takes his favorite hat to the laundry, he has to ask his family for help finding it. The questions continue as Jack & Jill help him figure out which of his toys will float or sink in the water.

programme.title: E3 - Learning, Growing & Having Fun!
programme.desc: Buster is learning, growing & having fun! First, he gets covered in mud & needs to get clean, but he's frightened by the big, noisy carwash! He has to work up the courage to try it himself. Then, after eating too many sweets, Buster gets a sore tooth & Amber the Ambulance teaches him the importance of keeping his teeth clean. In a race against Terry Tractor, Buster also learns that slow & steady can sometimes win the race!

programme.title: E1 - Our Favorite Family Adventures!
programme.desc: Join Buster on his favorite family adventures! When Mummy has to dash off to work, Buster & Grandpa have to make dinner together. They follow a recipe & it creates a big mess, but it's still tasty! The adventures continue as Buster & Daddy spend the day together, playing soccer & chasing a runaway kite! Plus, the whole family goes on an outdoor camping trip where a runaway tent causes chaos through the campsite.

programme.title: E1 - From Dinosaurs To Pet Knights!
programme.desc: Blippi is on an adventure from dinosaurs to pet knights! He travels back in time with Tabbs to help a little Microraptor prove that being small has its benefits when they rescue a giant sauropod from the mud. Then, they head to the African savannah to learn how to roar, sneak & pounce like a lion! Back at the clubhouse, Blippi learns how to interpret a puppy's tail wags & even travels back in time again to help a real-life knight in shining armor—who happens to be a corgi!

programme.title: E1 - Awesome Animal Facts!
programme.desc: Blippi is learning awesome facts about all kinds of animals! He & D.BO travel back in time to meet the biggest dinosaurs, like the Argentinosaurus, & even try to keep a T-Rex as a pet for a day! Back in the present, they shrink down to count a shark's teeth with a pilot fish dentist. The adventure continues as Blippi learns how elephants use their trunks to keep cool & discovers why cats have whiskers from a local feline celebrity.

programme.title: E1 - Learning to Do the Right Thing!
programme.desc: Join Buster as he learns to do the right thing! When Buster accidentally breaks the class flower, he panics & tries to cover it up, but soon learns that telling the truth is always the best thing to do. Then, when he & Daddy spot a steam train speeding out of control, they know they have to do the right thing! They race after the train & save the day! From cleaning up his toys to helping a puppy, Buster is always trying to do the right thing.

programme.title: E1 - JJ's Yummy Food & Clean-Up Fun!
programme.desc: It's a day of yummy food & clean-up fun with JJ! First, learn about all types of pasta & make some from scratch in Grandma's kitchen. Then, Cody's Dad shows how fun & tasty healthy eating can be with delicious sliced fruit. After all the fun, it's time to clean up! JJ's family gives Bingo a scrub in the tub after he gets dirty playing outside, & all the kids chip in to wash a filthy firetruck. It's fun to make a mess, & even more fun to clean up!

programme.title: E105
programme.desc: An interactive programme that's as fun as it is informative and reactive to the meteorological events of the moment. Reports from the regions and special subjects in the studio offer an easy way to better understand the impact weather has on health, nature, history and everyday life.

programme.title: E18 - Coconut, An Incredibly Versatile Fruit
programme.desc: Coconut, coconut water, coconut milk, coconut oil, coconut flour... a few ideas for making full use of the coconut palm's fruit. Also featured: the role of diet in cognitive health; pastries with forest-inspired flavours.

programme.title: E105
programme.desc: An interactive programme that's as fun as it is informative and reactive to the meteorological events of the moment. Reports from the regions and special subjects in the studio offer an easy way to better understand the impact weather has on health, nature, history and everyday life.

programme.title: E5 - La Molignee
programme.desc: On the road to the province of Namur and the Molignee valley, a picturesque location of high biological value and a Natura 2000 site. Detours to Sosoye and Falaen, among the most beautiful villages in Wallonia, the Abbey of Maredsous, Biesmeree and Florennes.

programme.title: E3 - Auto Retro Bourguebus
programme.desc: Meeting with the Auto Retro Bourguebus association. Laurent then goes to Ryes, to visit a couple of comic book professionals and admire their collector's Renault 4 CV. Michel presents a sporty Peugeot that was long unloved: the 309 GTI.

programme.title: E3 - Jubilee Of The Vatican, When Rome Regains Its Splendor
programme.desc: In 2025, Rome will host the Vatican Jubilee, an important event for Catholics worldwide that takes place every twenty-five years. More than 32 million visitors are expected in the Italian capital, which takes the opportunity to restore and highlight its architectural and cultural treasures.

programme.title: E6 - Creative Belgitude: A Series Of Talents!
programme.desc: Head for Adventure Valley in Durbuy, transformed for the occasion into a realm of fear. Also Eric-Emmanuel Schmitt, writer and playwright, opens the doors of his chateau in the heart of Hainaut; the Gimber drink; Patrick Syen and his Bentleys; and the Pluriel restaurant.

programme.title: E8 - Organic Farming, Agriculture For The Future
programme.desc: In Polynesia, food consumption has relied primarily on imports for many years. But since the 1990s, independent farmers have been championing organic, locally based agriculture that respects the cycles of nature, as in ancient times.

programme.title: E37 - Azay-Le-Ferron - La Guerche
programme.desc: The Chateau of Azay-le-Ferron is a true architectural chameleon, with influences ranging from the 15th to the 20th centuries. Built to defend and impress, the Chateau of La Guerche was partially cut down during the French Revolution.

programme.title: E16 - Louis Gabriel Nouchi
programme.desc: Viviane welcomes her first menswear designer! Louis Gabriel Nouchi presents his 2023-2024 autumn-winter collection, inspired by the novel ''American Psycho'' by Bret Easton Ellis.

programme.title: Légendes urbaines
programme.desc: Un moment dédié pour donner la parole aux grands acteurs des cultures urbaines mondiales. Ils sont les têtes d'affiches des genres musicaux les plus écoutés aujourd'hui mais sont parfois méconnus du grand public. Une découverte de la face cachée' de ces artistes, derrière les clichés, les postures, et loin de l'actualité promotionnelle.'

programme.title: Légendes urbaines
programme.desc: Un moment dédié pour donner la parole aux grands acteurs des cultures urbaines mondiales. E103 - No Parking/Bean's Bounty
programme.desc: Mr Bean drives his favourite Teddy to the cinema to see his favourite movie - 'Titanic'. Now he simply has to park the car. But when you're Mr Bean, nothing's simple. His ingenious efforts to find a parking space are persistently foiled.

programme.title: E61 - Lunch With Tables/Grizzly The Movie
programme.desc: The Bears have lunch with Ranger Tabes. But when a mystery presents itself, Tabes goes into full on detective mode to find the culprit.

programme.title: E145 - The Father/The Cringe/The Neighbor/The Pact/The Faith
programme.desc: When Frankie attends a party at The Watterson's he realises it's a holiday Granny Jojo made up to celebrate the day he left. Richard is feeling sad about the years he lost with Frankie so the kids try anything to cheer him up.

programme.title: E29 - B. Thank You/Adventure Time with Fionna & Cake/The Monster/Still/Wizard Battle
programme.desc: The Snow Golem and his beseeching pup pay a visit to the Fire Kingdom.

programme.title: E115 - Wing Nuts/Cat Dance Fever/Hunger Games/Hair Today, Gone Tomorrow/Missing In Traction/
programme.desc: After another destructive bout of cat and mouse Hildie and Beatie decide that Tom’s bad cat-titude has caused nothing but trouble around the cottage.

programme.title: E101 - Princess Buttercup/Horn, Sweet Horn/The Stayover/The Wrinklegruff Gals/Strong Armed
programme.desc: When Buttercup starts spending a lot of time with her new friends, a group of bad-girl skaters called The Derbytantes, it seems the Powerpuff Girls are down to two, which delights Princess Morbucks, who wants to fill the empty slot.

programme.title: E7 - Litterbug/Rat Trap
programme.desc: Mr Bean is tired of litterbugs and attempts to clean up the whole town himself…with disastrous results.

programme.title: E33 - The Junk House In The Pond/A Super Hero's Day Off/An Adventure In The Jungle/A Day In
programme.desc: Shiro looks for the Bobobobobone in the deep pond while cleaning up the garbage. Deca tries to steal it disappearing into the pile of garbage.

programme.title: E6 - The Book Loving...
programme.desc: Kenichi and Anemone settle down at a lake far away from Dahlia. Myare finds them by tracing their smells.

programme.title: E3 - The Ghost Of Martel
programme.desc: Allen and Kanda investigate town Martel and find an Innocence taken by the Akuma. Kanda refuses to help Allen and leaves with the Martel residents.

programme.title: E4 - Aria Of The Land And The Night Sky
programme.desc: Allen is attacked by a level 2 Akuma that can imitate anybody. They learn that the ghost of Martel is not a ghost, but a moving and singing doll.

programme.title: E4 - Magical Research Begins In Earnest
programme.desc: Shion is thrilled to discover his new magic. On the other hand, Marie practises fencing to shake off the bad memory.

programme.title: E31
programme.desc: In Onjeong Market, located in Onjeong, a town some distance away from Seoul, the area is buzzing with change as apartment complexes are built and plans for subway extensions and new town developments are announced. Across a single street stand a principled general hospital, Gongmyeongjeongdae Clinic, and traditional Korean clinic, Yangji Barun Clinic. The two families who run these places have been bitter enemies for years, bound by a long standing grudge from an incident in the past. Even the smallest matters turn into big fights, making them the most famous rival families in Onjeong. This is a family growth drama about these two families as they unravel their long held misunderstandings, heal their wounds, learn to love one another, and are reborn as one family.

programme.desc: In the Everglades of Florida, Otto and Pascal Feyh hunt an invasive species of snake, the Burmese python, which can grow up to five metres long.

programme.desc: Duncan talks Ant into buying a 1991 BMW 30 325i, convinced there's profit to be made. Meanwhile, Ant races to finish the hallway of the farmhouse.

programme.desc: Rick plows through Vegas Valley paydirt and makes a big score, but an obstacle threatens to stall him. Parker's four-plant blitz stumbles.

programme.title: E3
programme.desc: An original sci-fi drama based on Ogawa Satoshi's novel, scripted by Yoshida Reiko. In 2125, Mars hosts 100,000 settlers under ISDA's control, as tension brews between authority and freedom. Lili-E1102 (Suri Lin), a visually impaired woman born on Mars, endures harsh training to reach Earth-for one reason: to meet Shiraishi Aoto (Suda Masaki), a young ISDA officer, and honor a secret promise. But when a catastrophic event derails her mission, it sparks a chain of schemes between Mars and Earth-leading to consequences far greater than anyone imagined.

E7 - 敖子逸蔣依依又遇搭檔危機
programme.desc: 一檔演員搭檔研習進階真人秀，由關錦鵬、吳鎮宇、許鞍華擔當“研習制作人”，參與研習階段任務、監制和拍攝作品，蘇可擔任“研習指導”，陳喬恩、謝娜、李維嘉、吳昕作為“研習助力團”；十多位參與的青年演員，通過共同的生活和訓練，共同開啟尋找搭檔的研習生活。

programme.title: E13 - 三大特色大賽爆笑來襲
programme.desc: 重磅打造的全明星爆笑旅行遊戲真人秀，由黃曉明、黃子韜、劉耀文、邵子恆、王鶴棣、于洋組成「宇宙爆閃團」，用高能抽象任務，打造解壓式快樂體驗，去有趣的地方做有意義的事；放下偶像包袱，發送獨一無二的快樂訊號。

programme.title: E23 - Family Meeting
programme.desc: When Dad's accused of fluffing in Bluey's face as he climbed out of bed, he's put on trial with Mum as the judge, and Bluey and Bingo as witnesses. Bluey might also have to explain what she was doing there.

programme.title: E17 - The World Record
programme.desc: The Squirrels want to get a World Record, but in what? And Duggee is too busy to help. 'If only we had more Duggee's' muses Tag. Which gives Norrie a record-breaking idea...

programme.title: E19 - The Laughter Badge
programme.desc: From sensible chuckles and nervous giggles to Duggee's infectious laughter, once everyone starts, it's so hard to stop. What were they laughing about again? Anyone remember?

programme.title: E20 - The Midnight Badge
programme.desc: Loveable Duggee and the Squirrels return with more educational fun.

programme.title: E13 - Master Of Puppets
programme.desc: At Squirrel Club, there's a story told in blocks, the tale of a first tooth, a fable about changing emotions, and a yarn involving the Squirrels as puppets.

programme.title: E14 - Night And Day
programme.desc: Have you ever wondered what goes on at the Squirrel Club when the sun goes down?

programme.title: E15 - Say Cheese
programme.desc: The Squirrels learn about butterflies and tortoises.

programme.title: E16 - Eugene's Animal Chorus
programme.desc: Eugene gives an unexpected performance with help from some talented animals! Mooo!

programme.title: E7 - Safari Party
programme.desc: Join the dance party with the Teletubbies! Tinky Winky, Dipsy, Laa-Laa and Po dance and sing on safari.

programme.title: E9 - Diesel Do Right

programme.title: Orca Baby
programme.desc: Morgan, the deaf orca, is about to give birth to her very first calf. The stakes are high, and the staff at Loro Parque are holding their collective breath as the scene is set for the greatest natural phenomenon in the zoo's history.

programme.title: CD
programme.desc: So colourful, so shiny let's re use them to make some cool accessories.

programme.title: The Deadly Zombie Fungus
programme.desc: The Cordyceps fungal spores are capable of controlling and killing insects. They enter the insect's body and digest it from the inside. They can even steer its mind and make it do things that help spread the spores further.

programme.title: The Refrigerator
programme.desc: Nolik gets stuck to a piece of chewing gum and Tom Thomas puts him in the freezer to help get it off. Unfortunately he forgets that he left Nolik inside of there. How will Nolik escape from this danger?

programme.title: Self-Portrait
programme.desc: This episode shows how an artist can determine the accurate placement of eyes, ears, nose, chin, and lips on portraits by using proportions. We show you how you can do the same by just using a string and applying some rules about the human body.

programme.title: Reuse Cardboard Boxes
programme.desc: The Grimwades come to a historic castle for the day. They decide to reuse cardboard boxes and make a play castle. The family goes in search of boxes and finds some at the ice-cream shop. They ask if they can reuse them and the children start to build a castle.

programme.title: It's Not a Phase
programme.desc: Doodle Girl helps the boy band Drawn 4Gether by doodling a stage, microphones, and an audience so their concert can go on perfectly.

programme.title: Itchy Crusty Scabs
programme.desc: In this episode, Billy Bones, Mr. Grumbles, and Dr. Chris try to stop Dr. Xand from itching his scab! Find out how scabs work and why you shouldn't scratch them as the doctors show you how to make edible scabs – yummy!

programme.title: The Last Dance
programme.desc: Finn and Kirsten need a medal-winning routine to pursue their goal of the Acro World Championship. So coach Nikki has brought in a top choreographer who hopefully holds the key to success. Meanwhile, things aren't going so well for Dove and Izzy.

programme.title: Sloth Moths and Their Very Slow Host
programme.desc: For sloths, every day is a bad-hair day. Their matted locks are crawling with life - from parasites, to algae to a colony of sloth moths. Sloths provide a breeding ground for the moths too!

programme.title: Orca Baby
programme.desc: Morgan, the deaf orca, is about to give birth to her very first calf. The stakes are high, and the staff at Loro Parque are holding their collective breath as the scene is set for the greatest natural phenomenon in the zoo's history.

programme.title: CD
programme.desc: So colourful, so shiny let's re use them to make some cool accessories.

programme.title: Do Giants Like Hexagons?
programme.desc: The Giant's Causeway in Northern Ireland is made up of around 40,000 interlocking basalt columns, most of which are hexagonal. Nature is very efficient, so it uses this hexagonal arrangement in many places, such as bubbles and beehives.

programme.title: Excellence Award
programme.desc: Mai and Oto show off their recent awards to Vik, who also wants to win one. Mai, Oto, and Yoko organize competitions, but Vik keeps coming second because he always ends up helping his friends. Therefore he wins the 'Best Friend Award.'

programme.title: Rescue and Recovery
programme.desc: Gemma holds her breath and nose as Slab, the Staffy, goes under the knife. Two newly rehomed Labradors dish out the love and the licks. And Marisa rescues a three-legged tomcat.

programme.title: E8 - Victoria: Culinary Roadtrip
programme.desc: Sara heads to Victoria where she visits the farms and wineries, which she finds after travelling inland from the Great Ocean Road. She is planning to visit the restaurant Brae, which is run by an unknown chef.

programme.title: E1 - Lionfish
programme.desc: The white sand beaches and emerald green waters of Destin, Florida are the setting for the 'World's Luckiest Fishing Villages.' Beneath the water's surface, it's a different story...one of the most formidable species, the lionfish, has been wreaking havoc on the local ecosystem for decades. The ecological advantage of the lionfish is its venomous spikes, used to corner prey and protect itself from predators, and giving it an advantage over native fish. Luckily, local conservationists and fishing captains discovered years ago that lionfish are as tasty as they are dangerous. Yia joins local biologist Alex Fogg as he works to mitigate the lionfish's damage by harvesting them one buttery, flaky bite at a time.

programme.title: E8 - Victoria: Culinary Roadtrip
programme.desc: Sara heads to Victoria where she visits the farms and wineries, which she finds after travelling inland from the Great Ocean Road. She is planning to visit the restaurant Brae, which is run by an unknown chef.

programme.title: E1 - Lionfish
programme.desc: The white sand beaches and emerald green waters of Destin, Florida are the setting for the 'World's Luckiest Fishing Villages.' Beneath the water's surface, it's a different story...one of the most formidable species, the lionfish, has been wreaking havoc on the local ecosystem for decades. The ecological advantage of the lionfish is its venomous spikes, used to corner prey and protect itself from predators, and giving it an advantage over native fish. Luckily, local conservationists and fishing captains discovered years ago that lionfish are as tasty as they are dangerous. Yia joins local biologist Alex Fogg as he works to mitigate the lionfish's damage by harvesting them one buttery, flaky bite at a time.

programme.title: E1 - South Australia
programme.desc: In the first part of the episode, Andy explores sustainable kingfish farming in Spencer Gulf, South Australia, visiting Clean Seas sea farm and preparing fresh kingfish sashimi with the team. Moving to Kangaroo Island, he learns pickling techniques with Kate from Kangaroo Island Source, showcasing her products in a Carne Asada Taco. The episode continues with Andy exploring d'Arenberg's multi-function building and 'The Cube,' experiencing a Chef's Table, and concludes at Wirra Wirra winery, where he cooks Yogurt Flatbread with Olive Oil and Dukka, enjoying it with the staff and their wines.

Adventure of The King
programme.desc: Emperor Zhengde of the Ming Dynasty is young and playful, privately escapes from Palace to avoid the appointed marriage. He loses his memory by accident and luckily comes across Ms. Li to take care him. Prince Ningxia takes this opportunity to rebel the kingdom and catch the emperor to execute him immediately at the execution ground. At a critical time, three entourages rescue the Emperor and the prince Ningxia is arrested. However, Ms Li has refused to get marriage with the emperor due to his cheating on her love feelings.

programme.title: The Monkey King 3
programme.desc: On the conflict-packed journey to the West for the scriptures, escorted by Sun, Bajie and Sha, Xuanzang, the Tang Priest, accidentally enters the Womanland of Western Liang, a mysterious nation where no men has ever been existed. The Queen falls for Xuanzang at first sight, without knowing what love is, thinking she could be terminally ill with incurable lovesickness. The Preceptor warns her that men are all poisonous creatures and orders to kill Xuanzang and his disciples. With the help of the Queen, the four flee the execution site, but later Xuanzang, Bajie and Sha carelessly drink the water from the Motherhood River that makes them pregnant rapidly. Wukong tries to save the three with his almighty transforming sorcery, when Xuanzang gradually loses his stand to falls in love with the Queen. programme.title: E15 - Rise Of The Office Machines
programme.desc: To simplify tedious office tasks in the mid-20th century, one unknown company introduces the world's first photocopier and becomes a household name, which kicks off a rivalry between two iconic brands.

programme.title: E246 - Mysteries Of Scotland
programme.desc: For thousands of years, Scotland has been an epicentre of otherworldly phenomena. It is home to strange ancient stone circles, stories of strange beings. Is Scotland a magnet for extraterrestrial visitors?

programme.title: E10 - Falling Stars
programme.desc: The team zeroes in on the island of Bermuda-namesake of the Triangle-and one of the most infamous mysteries that helped establish the dark reputation of these waters.

programme.title: E388 - Wolfemen Vs. The Automatons
programme.desc: The competitive pinball-wizard Wolfe brothers meet coin-op king Dirk at his giant poultry barn turned private arcade. Mike and Robbie enter a hangar full of ultra-rare games and choice carnival relics.

programme.title: E13 - Mapping It Out
programme.desc: The team is ecstatic when a newly discovered treasure map turns out to be more accurate than they could ever have imagined.

programme.title: E1 - Sunken Nazi Secrets
programme.desc: Treasure hunter Darrel Miklos is embarking on a mission to solve one of the most intriguing mysteries in history: the disappearance of the Nazi's looted WWII treasure, estimated to be worth billions.

programme.title: E21
programme.desc: 本劇講述二戰期間1942-1945年澳門「孤島」時期的抗戰風雲故事。 1941年12月香港淪陷後，澳葡政府名為“中立”，實則任由日軍澤榮作特務機關橫行霸道。愛國華人何賢、馬萬祺以及中共地下黨柯麟等人以強烈的愛國心與責任感團結同胞，凝聚澳門華人社團力量奮力反抗。

programme.title: E21
programme.desc: 本劇講述二戰期間1942-1945年澳門「孤島」時期的抗戰風雲故事。 1941年12月香港淪陷後，澳葡政府名為“中立”，實則任由日軍澤榮作特務機關橫行霸道。愛國華人何賢、馬萬祺以及中共地下黨柯麟等人以強烈的愛國心與責任感團結同胞，凝聚澳門華人社團力量奮力反抗。

programme.title: E22
programme.desc: 本劇講述二戰期間1942-1945年澳門「孤島」時期的抗戰風雲故事。 1941年12月香港淪陷後，澳葡政府名為“中立”，實則任由日軍澤榮作特務機關橫行霸道。愛國華人何賢、馬萬祺以及中共地下黨柯麟等人以強烈的愛國心與責任感團結同胞，凝聚澳門華人社團力量奮力反抗。

programme.title: E12
programme.desc: 痴迷於數學的帥家默偶然發現金華縣一個歷史遺留問題，他在試圖糾正錯誤的過程中頻頻遇阻，並引發了各利益集團間的博弈。 軍戶出身的帥家默對數學極其感興趣，在一次拿各縣賦稅練習數學時，偶然發現有一筆科目叫作“人丁絲絹”稅收數目有疑點。經過查詢，帥家默知道有人偷換概念、移花接木，把原本各縣的賦稅轉嫁給了一個縣。帥家默瞭解此事後決定申訴，但在申訴過程中遇到重重困難，險些喪命，“人丁絲絹案”就此擱淺。後遇改革，舊案重提，經過帥家默和各方努力才讓真相大白於天下。

programme.title: E38
programme.desc: 先天二年夏秋之交，天子雖已登基，但大長公主勢力更盛，長安局勢陰晴難定。盧凌風和蘇無名，奉命帶著由裴喜君、費雞師、櫻桃和薛環組成的探案小隊，以護送康國所獻金桃的名義重返長安。

programme.title: E1244 - Pushpa Impossible
programme.desc: Pushpa Patel, a small entrepreneur and an endearing mother of three faces life's challenges with resilience and courage. Her constant pursuit of living a good life serves as an inspiration to many.

programme.title: E46 - Hui Gumm Yaadein
programme.desc: Dr. Dev Mehta, a top surgeon who can't remember his own skills & past 8 years of life. now, forced to restart as an intern and have to re-learn medicine and face the family he no longer knows

programme.title: The Agenda
programme.desc: A weekly talk-show looking beyond the headlines and “accepted wisdom” to find the real story. Hosted by award-winning journalist and presenter Stephen Cole, The Agenda quite simply sets The Agenda . You won't find the same-old talking heads recycling platitudes; instead thought-provoking guests to debate and explore key issues of today's world. Using virtual reality graphics to bring subjects to life, Stephen will navigate through subjects ranging from “Prove That Climate Change Exists” to “Who Will Win the Race to Space”. Opposing views will be given opportunity to flourish and develop into a meaningful conversation. The Agenda: No nonsense talk; Challenging perceptions.

programme.desc: ‘Executive Decisions' is a CNBC podcast offering a rare window into the minds of top decision-makers. Hosted by Steve Sedgwick, each episode explores the pivotal choices that shape the careers and legacies of business leaders and policymakers. Through candid conversations about risk, doubt and conviction, the series reminds us that even the most powerful face uncertainty and trade-offs.

programme.title: Fei Eventing Nations Cup
programme.desc: The FEI Eventing Nations Cup celebrates its 14th year in 2026. The Series is open to all nations fielding one team composed of 3 or 4 riders at each leg and is run under FEI Eventing rules at CICO4 level, with nations accumulating points under a dedicated system for the Series.

programme.title: E21

programme.title: E1 - Lemurs of Anja Mountain
programme.desc: Millions of years ago, castaway creatures were stranded on the rugged shores of Madagascar. Left to evolve on their own, they’ve found a way to perfectly adapt to their tropical climate. Now, see what life is like for a family of ring-tailed lemurs.

programme.title: E6 - Baboon Lagoon
programme.desc: Enter the wilds of South Africa to get an intimate look into one of the continent’s most misunderstood primates. Like humans, these primates have unique personalities and share strong bonds with their families and friends.

programme.title: E5 - Ireland
programme.desc: Explore an island surrounded by the mighty Atlantic ocean, subjected to pounding waves and driving rain. From the Cliffs of Moher to the Giant’s Causeway, this land has been shaped and reshaped by the power of water and violent geological forces.

programme.title: A Bee's Diary
programme.desc: In a beehive, tens of thousands of tiny animals work toward a common goal: the survival of the colony. But what is life like for an individual honeybee? A Bee’s Diary tells that story.

programme.title: Weird, Wild & Wonderful
programme.desc: Trek across Africa for a peek at the colorful, quirky survival strategies of its animals. See these furry, feathered, and scaled magicians, from flamboyant flamingos to vanishing lizards, find food, elude predators, and find mates against all odds.

programme.title: A Bee's Diary
programme.desc: In a beehive, tens of thousands of tiny animals work toward a common goal: the survival of the colony. But what is life like for an individual honeybee? A Bee’s Diary tells that story.

programme.title: Weird, Wild & Wonderful
programme.desc: Trek across Africa for a peek at the colorful, quirky survival strategies of its animals. See these furry, feathered, and scaled magicians, from flamboyant flamingos to vanishing lizards, find food, elude predators, and find mates against all odds.

programme.title: E6 - Masked Bandits
programme.desc: Capture teams from Kenya head to Somali border to capture 50 rare and endangered antelope called a hirola. The hirola numbers have been plummeting over the last decade, and conservation groups know that by capturing and placing them into a protected predator-free conservancy they will rebound.

programme.title: E5 - Creepiest Crawlies
programme.desc: New Zealand’s isolated islands are famed as an unusual paradise, home to a variety of unique wildlife. Best known for its flightless birds, ancient reptiles and coastal mammals, a closer look reveals another world. A land of miniature monsters, Lilliputian predators and tiny terrors that lead remarkable lives, where every hunter is also the hunted and survival is always a giant struggle. Journey into the undergrowth and discover life on a different scale. From giant carnivorous centipedes and nocturnal crickets to fishing spiders and glowing worms with silken traps. Weird and wonderful, these unsung heroes are Wildest New Zealand’s Creepiest Crawlies.

programme.title: E2 - Rebuilding an Empire
programme.desc: Over the course of recorded time, many species have been threatened with extinction. Once-powerful animal empires – like the dinosaurs - have been completely wiped from the planet. But others once on the verge of disappearance have survived, bounced back, and even reclaimed their kingdoms.

programme.title: How the Wild Things Sleep
programme.desc: Tap into one of the least understood areas of animal science: sleep. Check out adaptations made by the most extreme snoozers on Earth, from tiny bees who doze for 20 hours a day to enormous elephants who survive on just two precious hours of rest.

Weird and wonderful, these unsung heroes are Wildest New Zealand’s Creepiest Crawlies.

programme.title: E2 - Rebuilding an Empire
programme.desc: Over the course of recorded time, many species have been threatened with extinction. Once-powerful animal empires – like the dinosaurs - have been completely wiped from the planet. But others once on the verge of disappearance have survived, bounced back, and even reclaimed their kingdoms.

programme.title: How the Wild Things Sleep
programme.desc: Tap into one of the least understood areas of animal science: sleep. Check out adaptations made by the most extreme snoozers on Earth, from tiny bees who doze for 20 hours a day to enormous elephants who survive on just two precious hours of rest.

programme.title: How the Wild Things Sleep
programme.desc: Tap into one of the least understood areas of animal science: sleep. Check out adaptations made by the most extreme snoozers on Earth, from tiny bees who doze for 20 hours a day to enormous elephants who survive on just two precious hours of rest.

programme.title: Weird, Wild & Wonderful
programme.desc: Trek across Africa for a peek at the colorful, quirky survival strategies of its animals. See these furry, feathered, and scaled magicians, from flamboyant flamingos to vanishing lizards, find food, elude predators, and find mates against all odds.

programme.title: The Super Launching
programme.desc: The Super Launching is a geek program in the realm of popular science. Dedicated to showcasing new technologies, achievements, and breakthroughs from around the world, the program focuses on both highlighting existing hot topics and generating new ones, offering the audience a glimpse into the latest popular science and industry developments. Anchored in an innovative city with a global perspective, the Super Launching has established itself as the best platform for global premieres, debuts, and the launch of first stores.

programme.desc: The feature program 'Trailblazing' on Shenzhen TV fully illustrates Shenzhen's trailblazing exploration and demonstration role as a pilot demonstration zone for socialism with Chinese characteristics. programme.desc: 講述世界排名第一的拳擊選手李權淑在令全韓國為之瘋狂後突然引退並銷聲匿跡；某一天體育經理人的出現並提出了一個讓她無法拒絕的復出提議，而隨之發生的故事。

programme.title: E9
programme.desc: 一位正直的明星律師兼忠實粉絲，在偶像被指控謀殺後挺身而出，為他辯護。「孟世娜」是擁有豐富經歷的刑事辯護律師，同時是偶像團體Gold Boys的十年以上的忠實粉絲。在Gold Boys的主唱「都來益」因捲入殺人事件而成為嫌疑人時，她隱藏了自己的崇拜之情，為他辯護，並揭示了一個意想不到的真相。

programme.title: E2
programme.desc: 鷹野爪子是一名外表聰明幹練、聲音沉穩的女子。她充滿自信，同時謙遜有禮，充滿王牌風範。雖然看似能幹，但其實非常無能。另一方面，鷹野的同期鶸田道人則是和爪子完全相反，是個外表看似無能實則十分能幹的可憐上班族。這樣的他，卻被迫成為在公司內部終日無所事事的鷹野的搭檔，開始了極其不幸的職場生活。

programme.title: E2
programme.desc: 故事以夏日的相遇為主題，在海邊一起出生及長大的「海邊的灰姑娘」女子三人組與在東京就讀一流大學的優等生男子們相識的故事。在盛夏的海邊出現命運般的相遇，各人一起努力跨越看不見的差異，帶著複雜交錯的感情，相互交織想法一起成長。

programme.title: I'm Your Man
programme.desc: A scientist accepts an offer to participate in an extraordinary experiment: for three weeks, she is to live with a humanoid robot, created to make her happy

programme.title: E18 - Gimmick
programme.desc: A mysterious death in a hotel leads the squad into the world of professional fighting. Benson tries to convince a victim to come forward for the sake of his friend.

programme.title: E4 - Clickbait
programme.desc: When a tween suffers a life-threatening miscarriage, the SVU must unravel a web of online fabrications to identify a suspect. Rollins carefully weighs her career options.

programme.title: E6 - Under The Influence
programme.desc: The squad investigates an assault at a house party where no one can identify the assailant. When two suspects are detained for questioning, Rollins takes the chance to turn one against the other.

programme.title: E7 - False Idols
programme.desc: The SVU must determine fact from fantasy when a famous author twists the details of a serious crime. Fin has a challenging day at work.

programme.title: E8 - Showdown
programme.desc: When a man claims his girlfriend was kidnapped, Bruno investigates the holes in his story. Tynan comes down hard on Benson after a disagreement. Griffin must defend his policework on the stand.

programme.title: E11 - Fidelis Ad Mortem
programme.desc: When Curry's son finds a disturbing cassette tape in a thrift store haul, she and Benson must investigate a decades-old missing persons case. Griffin learns a disturbing rumor about his father.

programme.title: E18 - Gimmick
